news.title: Apple's MacBook Pro 14 cannot handle the M5 Max
news.description: If you are interested in the new M5 Max SoC, we recommend you get the larger MacBook Pro 16. The compact 14-inch model suffers from inconsistent performance. This is not only the case for the stress test, but also pure CPU or GPU performance.
